understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue completing subsequent levels until the game is won, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or a `CLICK` on a specific `[x,y]` tile (or `UNDO` to revert the previous action). After any horizontal move, the player automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, hitting a hazard (spikes `u`/`v`, which immediately ends the attempt), or reaching the goal `+`. Clicks remove breakable/clickable blocks (`x`) to open new fall paths and do not move the player. Planning is guided by the state’s `movement.left_landing`/`right_landing` and `corridor_scan` to identify safe landings and prioritize columns marked as passages (drops to a different y-level). `UNDO` can be used to recover from a bad move/click.

understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue completing subsequent levels until the game is won, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or a `CLICK` on a specific `[x,y]` tile (or `UNDO` to revert the previous action). After any horizontal move, the player automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, hitting a hazard (spikes `u`/`v`, which immediately ends the attempt), or reaching the goal `+`. Clicks remove breakable/clickable blocks (`x`) to open new fall paths and do not move the player. Planning is guided by the state’s `movement.left_landing`/`right_landing` and `corridor_scan` to identify safe landings and prioritize columns marked as passages (drops to a different y-level). `UNDO` can be used to recover from a bad move/click.
